sentences.translation: I eat an apple every day.

sentences.text: Although it was cold, he {still/never/barely} went out for a run.
sentences.translation: Although it was cold, he still went out for a run.
He prepared carefully for the exam.

sentences.text: With the {development/decline/stagnation} of technology, life is becoming more convenient.
sentences.translation: With the development of technology, life is becoming more convenient.

sentences.text: His speech {attracted/ignored/deflected} the attention of the audience.
sentences.translation: His speech attracted the attention of the audience.
Economic globalisation brings both opportunities and challenges.

sentences.text: She {persisted with/abandoned/interrupted} years of training and {finally/nevertheless/never} won the championship.
sentences.translation: She persisted with years of training and finally won the championship.
His theory has overturned the long-held understanding.

sentences.text: The novel {illuminates/conceals/simplifies} the {complexity/superficiality/monotony} of human nature.
sentences.translation: The novel illuminates the complexity of human nature.

sentences.text: In the age of {information overload/technological stagnation/global isolation}, {critical/passive/emotional} thinking is {indispensable/superfluous/harmful}.
sentences.translation: In the age of information overload, critical thinking is indispensable.

sentences.text: Language is not only a tool of {communication/division/competition}, but also a {vehicle/mirror/barrier} of {thought/emotion/identity}.
sentences.translation: Language is not only a tool of communication, but also a vehicle of thought.

sentences.text: The expansion of {capital/power/technology} often comes at the expense of the {public interest/individual will/market}.
sentences.translation: The expansion of capital often comes at the expense of the public interest.
The policy revealed numerous weaknesses during its implementation.
